subject: forward to sergey
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Rahna Jalashgar <rjalashgar@nysgmail.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, January 8, 2007 11:58:08 AM
Subject: FW: Hog Cay Bahamas


 




From: privateislands@aol.com [mailto:privateislands@aol.com] 
Sent: Monday, January 08, 2007 11:53 AM
To: Rahna Jalashgar
Subject: Fwd: Hog Cay Bahamas


 
 
 
-----Original Message-----
From: privateislands@aol.com
To: hkim@nysgllc.com
Sent: Mon, 8 Jan 2007 11:35 AM
Subject: Hog Cay Bahamas


 Jeff:
 
Hope the new year finds you well.
If there is anything I can do for you, please do not hesitate to ask.
 
Hog Cay off Little Exuma, The Bahamas
681 acres
2500 ft. airstrip, main house with pool, guest houses 
Good elevations, several secluded coves and beaches
Airstrip can be expanded to 6000 ft.
Homes in need of repair and updating.
Price is $35 million.
 
See attached photos.
 
Kind Regards,
Brian Webster
